TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == An-ta-man a tademaw . An-ta-man a tademaw "Inkow a kamu, Andamanese", maliwawah i In-tu sawali nutimulan a An-ta-man kasasubal, kumu nu An-ta-man a kamuan, An-ta-man imahini angangan sepat ku niyazu', kasazuma Ta-an-man, Cya-low-wa. Owang-ci atu San-ti-ney-al. aenengan a lekec u tusaay a lekec, malaacawaay mikwaw tu milekec tu cacay ku acawa, labu nu luma' mikawaw tu tusa ku milaylayay. kakilimad keyzay a kawaw miadup atu miala. An-ta-man patatenga' tu Di'tu a lisin angangan a salisin pasu masaselalay atu mitademay. "An-ta-man" "Andeman" a ngangan makayzaay i In-tu-A-li-an ungay Di'tu "Ha-nu-man" "Hanuman" duduc In-tu a nisulitan tu nu likisi Low-mu-yan-na, An-ta-man subal I kasumamadan pala nu Ha-man a lala', namahiza Ma-lay subalay a Yincumicu u Handuman han, mala u ayzaay a An-ta-man 'Amilika a kamu "Andaman " han. Anta-man kaapuyu'an ku zuma a tademaw "caay ku San-ti-al dada'" hinisa zayhan caay kataneng ku nilacul nu subal sisa masinpusi tu ku i subalay. nilacul tademaw šļļŚŹ£ duduc In-tu a cebu i 2011 a mihca pasakamu tu nikinsaan tu tademaw, kasa binacadan a tademaw mahini, Ta-An-ta 44 ku tademaw cunus tu Cya-low-wa a tademaw, 380 ku tademaw nu Owng-ci, 101 ku tademaw nu San-ti-ney-al, 15 ku tademaw, 50 ku tademaw 150 ku tademaw. likis atu kacacayat nu lalangawanś≠∑ŚŹ≤ŤąáśĖáŚĆĖÁöĄťóúšŅā saakay An-tapman kasumamadan a niciluan i 1788 a mihca tawya zayhan An-ta-man a kasasubal caay kasaenal cunus tu balangbangan a bali, yadah ku satebuc nu balunga' mauzipay a tademaw hatu mapatay nu An-ta-man. namahiza Ing-kow mitanam atu An-ta-man mitiyung, patizeng tu minatu pawapen tu balunga' lihalay a tatukus. 1859 a mihcaan Ing-kow i An-ta-man subal patizeng tu Pu-lay-al a minatu, mala u kitizaan pazeng tu sicumiay. muenengay i Pu-lay-al minatu capi nu kilakilangan a Ta-an-ta-man a haymaw malingatu mitiyung tu Ing-kow cenbu a makakadum mizakep tu sicumiay, imaahini uyni a kitizaan tungus nu In-tuay lala'an. Ing-kow nu mabulaway cebu sakay pahabay atu An-ta-man a kacacayat, patizeng tu An-ta-man a luma' "Andaman homes". kaizaw keyzaÁ∂ďśŅüÁĒüÁĒĘ An-ta-man angangan u puu' nu demiad masumasumad a miadup atu miala tu sakauzip. Cya-low-wa atu San-ti-ney-al amin miida tu piadu atu miala a kawaw, u Owng-ci i 1958 a mihca pacumud tu sanasay paluma, nika caay pilihiza paluma, pakay piala tu sanasay pasay In-tu cebu nu painiay paliyun miala pabeli tu kakanan atu kusi a tuud, namahiza Owng-ci a kakanan u salunguc haymaw nu taway a tuud milutay tu nu kilakilangan a heci. misanga'ay tu tuudŚ∑•ś•≠ŤóĚŚďĀ An-ta-man zuma miida tu kilakilangan atu bayuay a kasilacul. suka atu nilung lait papulungen tu tuud nu An-ta-man kakanan a lalangawan, An-ta-man u sapisuped ku suka, nilung lait miapi tu salil, uyni a tuud hina mabakah nu naayaway a balinga' matabesi' nu laing tatukus. In-tu cebu mukinay a siuy, dangah atu sapisahemay pala umiyagien pabeli tu Owng-ci, ca-wa atu San-ti-ney-al, mikutay tu laylay nu lima nisangaan pakay pawalian nihuthutan nu lamal nisanga'an tu kapuwa siuy. puenengan ŚĪÖšĹŹś®°ŚľŹ An-ta-man a puenengan miduduc tu puu' nu mihcaan amasumad, puu' kacakan "10 a bulad katukuh 2 a bulad" u sepatay a labu nu luma' i dadipasan capi patizeng tu nu eli'ay a luma', eli'ay luma' pasaay teban samulu han milangat. zuma niyazu'ay tataytayay a tatama atu baluhay malaacawaay palaed han tu niyazu'ay a tademaw, mueneng i zumaay nu eli'ay a luma', yu masumad ku demiad katukuh 5 a bulad katukuh 9 a bulad hawsa, An-ta-man amakay dadipasan mabulaw tayza ney-lu labu nu kilakilangan mueneng, An-ta-man malecad eli' a luma' samulu han milangat, nika sepat anucaay lima ku labu nu luma tiza mueneng.
S.PHON: == an-ta-man a tad…ômaw . an-ta-man a tad…ômaw "inkow a kamu, andaman…ôs…ô", mar~…ĺiwawańß i in-tu sawar~…ĺi nutimur~…ĺan a an-ta-man kasasubar~…ĺ, kumu nu an-ta-man a kamuan, an-ta-man imańßini aŇčaŇčan s…ôpat ku nijazu Ē~ °, kasazuma ta-an-man, ¶ja-r~…ĺow-wa. owaŇč- ¶i atu san-ti-n…ô-ar~…ĺ. a…ôn…ôŇčan a r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶ u tusaaj a r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶, mar~…ĺaa ¶awaaj mikwaw tu mir~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶ tu ¶a ¶aj ku a ¶awa, r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mikawaw tu tusa ku mir~…ĺajr~…ĺajaj. kakir~…ĺimad k…ôzaj a kawaw miadup atu miar~…ĺa. an-ta-man patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tu di Ē~ °tu a r~…ĺisin aŇčaŇčan a sar~…ĺisin pasu masas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj atu mitad…ômaj. "an-ta-man" "and…ôman" a ŇčaŇčan makajzaaj i in-tu-a-r~…ĺi-an uŇčaj di Ē~ °tu "ńßa-nu-man" "ńßanuman" dudu ¶ in-tu a nisur~…ĺitan tu nu r~…ĺikisi r~…ĺow-mu-jan-na, an-ta-man subar~…ĺ i kasumamadan par~…ĺa nu ńßa-man a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, namańßiza ma-r~…ĺaj subar~…ĺaj a jin ¶umi ¶u u ńßanduman ńßan, mar~…ĺa u ajzaaj a an-ta-man Ē~ °amir~…ĺika a kamu "andaman " ńßan. anta-man kaapuju Ē~ °an ku zuma a tad…ômaw " ¶aaj ku san-ti-ar~…ĺ dada Ē~ °" ńßinisa zajńßan ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu subar~…ĺ sisa masinpusi tu ku i subar~…ĺaj. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tad…ômaw ** dudu ¶ in-tu a ¶…ôbu i **** a mińß ¶a pasakamu tu nikinsaan tu tad…ômaw, kasa bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw mańßini, ta-an-ta ** ku tad…ômaw ¶unus tu ¶ja-r~…ĺow-wa a tad…ômaw, *** ku tad…ômaw nu owŇč- ¶i, *** ku tad…ômaw nu san-ti-n…ô-ar~…ĺ, ** ku tad…ômaw, ** ku tad…ômaw *** ku tad…ômaw. r~…ĺikis atu ka ¶a ¶ajat nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan******** saakaj an-tapman kasumamadan a ni ¶ir~…ĺuan i **** a mińß ¶a tawja zajńßan an-ta-man a kasasubar~…ĺ ¶aaj kasa…ônar~…ĺ ¶unus tu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan a bar~…ĺi, jadańß ku sat…ôbu ¶ nu bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° mauzipaj a tad…ômaw ńßatu mapataj nu an-ta-man. namańßiza iŇč-kow mitanam atu an-ta-man mitijuŇč, patiz…ôŇč tu minatu pawap…ôn tu bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a tatukus. **** a mińß ¶aan iŇč-kow i an-ta-man subar~…ĺ patiz…ôŇč tu pu-r~…ĺaj-ar~…ĺ a minatu, mar~…ĺa u kitizaan paz…ôŇč tu si ¶umiaj. mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i pu-r~…ĺaj-ar~…ĺ minatu ¶api nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a ta-an-ta-man a ńßajmaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu mitijuŇč tu iŇč-kow ¶…ônbu a makakadum mizak…ôp tu si ¶umiaj, imaańßini ujni a kitizaan tuŇčus nu in-tuaj r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an. iŇč-kow nu mabur~…ĺawaj ¶…ôbu sakaj pańßabaj atu an-ta-man a ka ¶a ¶ajat, patiz…ôŇč tu an-ta-man a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° "andaman ńßom…ôs". kaizaw k…ôza**** an-ta-man aŇčaŇčan u puu Ē~ ° nu d…ômiad masumasumad a miadup atu miar~…ĺa tu sakauzip. ¶ja-r~…ĺow-wa atu san-ti-n…ô-ar~…ĺ amin miida tu piadu atu miar~…ĺa a kawaw, u owŇč- ¶i i **** a mińß ¶a pa ¶umud tu sanasaj par~…ĺuma, nika ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßiza par~…ĺuma, pakaj piar~…ĺa tu sanasaj pasaj in-tu ¶…ôbu nu painiaj par~…ĺijun miar~…ĺa pab…ôr~…ĺi tu kakanan atu kusi a tuud, namańßiza owŇč- ¶i a kakanan u sar~…ĺuŇču ¶ ńßajmaw nu tawaj a tuud mir~…ĺutaj tu nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a ńß…ô ¶i. misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu tuud**** an-ta-man zuma miida tu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan atu bajuaj a kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ. suka atu nir~…ĺuŇč r~…ĺait papur~…ĺuŇč…ôn tu tuud nu an-ta-man kakanan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, an-ta-man u sapisup…ôd ku suka, nir~…ĺuŇč r~…ĺait miapi tu sar~…ĺir~…ĺ, ujni a tuud ńßina mabakańß nu naajawaj a bar~…ĺiŇča Ē~ ° matab…ôsi Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺaiŇč tatukus. in-tu ¶…ôbu mukinaj a siuj, daŇčańß atu sapisańß…ômaj par~…ĺa umijagi…ôn pab…ôr~…ĺi tu owŇč- ¶i, ¶a-wa atu san-ti-n…ô-ar~…ĺ, mikutaj tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺima nisaŇčaan pakaj pawar~…ĺian nińßutńßutan nu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu kapuwa siuj. pu…ôn…ôŇčan **** an-ta-man a pu…ôn…ôŇčan midudu ¶ tu puu Ē~ ° nu mińß ¶aan amasumad, puu Ē~ ° ka ¶akan "** a bur~…ĺad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad" u s…ôpataj a r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i dadipasan ¶api patiz…ôŇč tu nu …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °aj r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pasaaj t…ôban samur~…ĺu ńßan mir~…ĺaŇčat. zuma nijazu Ē~ °aj tatajtajaj a tatama atu bar~…ĺuńßaj mar~…ĺaa ¶awaaj par~…ĺa…ôd ńßan tu nijazu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw, mu…ôn…ôŇč i zumaaj nu …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ju masumad ku d…ômiad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad ńßawsa, an-ta-man amakaj dadipasan mabur~…ĺaw tajza n…ô-r~…ĺu r~…ĺabu nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mu…ôn…ôŇč, an-ta-man mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ ° a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° samur~…ĺu ńßan mir~…ĺaŇčat, nika s…ôpat anu ¶aaj r~…ĺima ku r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma tiza mu…ôn…ôŇč.
S.FORM: == An-ta-man a tademaw . An-ta-man a tademaw "Inkow a kamu, Andamanese", maliwawah i In-tu sawali nutimulan a An-ta-man kasasubal, kumu nu An-ta-man a kamuan, An-ta-man imahini angangan sepat ku niyazu', kasazuma Ta-an-man, Cya-low-wa. Owang-ci atu San-ti-ney-al. aenengan a lekec u tusaay a lekec, malaacawaay mikwaw tu milekec tu cacay ku acawa, labu nu luma' mikawaw tu tusa ku milaylayay. kakilimad keyzay a kawaw miadup atu miala. An-ta-man patatenga' tu Di'tu a lisin angangan a salisin pasu masaselalay atu mitademay. "An-ta-man" "Andeman" a ngangan makayzaay i In-tu-A-li-an ungay Di'tu "Ha-nu-man" "Hanuman" duduc In-tu a nisulitan tu nu likisi Low-mu-yan-na, An-ta-man subal I kasumamadan pala nu Ha-man a lala', namahiza Ma-lay subalay a Yincumicu u Handuman han, mala u ayzaay a An-ta-man 'Amilika a kamu "Andaman " han. Anta-man kaapuyu'an ku zuma a tademaw "caay ku San-ti-al dada'" hinisa zayhan caay kataneng ku nilacul nu subal sisa masinpusi tu ku i subalay. nilacul tademaw šļļŚŹ£ duduc In-tu a cebu i 2011 a mihca pasakamu tu nikinsaan tu tademaw, kasa binacadan a tademaw mahini, Ta-An-ta 44 ku tademaw cunus tu Cya-low-wa a tademaw, 380 ku tademaw nu Owng-ci, 101 ku tademaw nu San-ti-ney-al, 15 ku tademaw, 50 ku tademaw 150 ku tademaw. likis atu kacacayat nu lalangawanś≠∑ŚŹ≤ŤąáśĖáŚĆĖÁöĄťóúšŅā saakay An-tapman kasumamadan a niciluan i 1788 a mihca tawya zayhan An-ta-man a kasasubal caay kasaenal cunus tu balangbangan a bali, yadah ku satebuc nu balunga' mauzipay a tademaw hatu mapatay nu An-ta-man. namahiza Ing-kow mitanam atu An-ta-man mitiyung, patizeng tu minatu pawapen tu balunga' lihalay a tatukus. 1859 a mihcaan Ing-kow i An-ta-man subal patizeng tu Pu-lay-al a minatu, mala u kitizaan pazeng tu sicumiay. muenengay i Pu-lay-al minatu capi nu kilakilangan a Ta-an-ta-man a haymaw malingatu mitiyung tu Ing-kow cenbu a makakadum mizakep tu sicumiay, imaahini uyni a kitizaan tungus nu In-tuay lala'an. Ing-kow nu mabulaway cebu sakay pahabay atu An-ta-man a kacacayat, patizeng tu An-ta-man a luma' "Andaman homes". kaizaw keyzaÁ∂ďśŅüÁĒüÁĒĘ An-ta-man angangan u puu' nu demiad masumasumad a miadup atu miala tu sakauzip. Cya-low-wa atu San-ti-ney-al amin miida tu piadu atu miala a kawaw, u Owng-ci i 1958 a mihca pacumud tu sanasay paluma, nika caay pilihiza paluma, pakay piala tu sanasay pasay In-tu cebu nu painiay paliyun miala pabeli tu kakanan atu kusi a tuud, namahiza Owng-ci a kakanan u salunguc haymaw nu taway a tuud milutay tu nu kilakilangan a heci. misanga'ay tu tuudŚ∑•ś•≠ŤóĚŚďĀ An-ta-man zuma miida tu kilakilangan atu bayuay a kasilacul. suka atu nilung lait papulungen tu tuud nu An-ta-man kakanan a lalangawan, An-ta-man u sapisuped ku suka, nilung lait miapi tu salil, uyni a tuud hina mabakah nu naayaway a balinga' matabesi' nu laing tatukus. In-tu cebu mukinay a siuy, dangah atu sapisahemay pala umiyagien pabeli tu Owng-ci, ca-wa atu San-ti-ney-al, mikutay tu laylay nu lima nisangaan pakay pawalian nihuthutan nu lamal nisanga'an tu kapuwa siuy. puenengan ŚĪÖšĹŹś®°ŚľŹ An-ta-man a puenengan miduduc tu puu' nu mihcaan amasumad, puu' kacakan "10 a bulad katukuh 2 a bulad" u sepatay a labu nu luma' i dadipasan capi patizeng tu nu eli'ay a luma', eli'ay luma' pasaay teban samulu han milangat. zuma niyazu'ay tataytayay a tatama atu baluhay malaacawaay palaed han tu niyazu'ay a tademaw, mueneng i zumaay nu eli'ay a luma', yu masumad ku demiad katukuh 5 a bulad katukuh 9 a bulad hawsa, An-ta-man amakay dadipasan mabulaw tayza ney-lu labu nu kilakilangan mueneng, An-ta-man malecad eli' a luma' samulu han milangat, nika sepat anucaay lima ku labu nu luma tiza mueneng.

"an-ta-man" "and…ôman" a ŇčaŇčan makajzaaj i in-tu-a-r~…ĺi-an uŇčaj di Ē~ °tu "ńßa-nu-man" "ńßanuman" dudu ¶ in-tu a nisur~…ĺitan tu nu r~…ĺikisi r~…ĺow-mu-jan-na, an-ta-man subar~…ĺ i kasumamadan par~…ĺa nu ńßa-man a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, namańßiza ma-r~…ĺaj subar~…ĺaj a jin ¶umi ¶u u ńßanduman ńßan, mar~…ĺa u ajzaaj a an-ta-man Ē~ °amir~…ĺika a kamu "andaman " ńßan. anta-man kaapuju Ē~ °an ku zuma a tad…ômaw " ¶aaj ku san-ti-ar~…ĺ dada Ē~ °" ńßinisa zajńßan ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu subar~…ĺ sisa masinpusi tu ku i subar~…ĺaj. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tad…ômaw ** dudu ¶ in-tu a ¶…ôbu i **** a mińß ¶a pasakamu tu nikinsaan tu tad…ômaw, kasa bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw mańßini, ta-an-ta ** ku tad…ômaw ¶unus tu ¶ja-r~…ĺow-wa a tad…ômaw, *** ku tad…ômaw nu owŇč- ¶i, *** ku tad…ômaw nu san-ti-n…ô-ar~…ĺ, ** ku tad…ômaw, ** ku tad…ômaw *** ku tad…ômaw. r~…ĺikis atu ka ¶a ¶ajat nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan******** saakaj an-tapman kasumamadan a ni ¶ir~…ĺuan i **** a mińß ¶a tawja zajńßan an-ta-man a kasasubar~…ĺ ¶aaj kasa…ônar~…ĺ ¶unus tu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan a bar~…ĺi, jadańß ku sat…ôbu ¶ nu bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° mauzipaj a tad…ômaw ńßatu mapataj nu an-ta-man. namańßiza iŇč-kow mitanam atu an-ta-man mitijuŇč, patiz…ôŇč tu minatu pawap…ôn tu bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a tatukus. **** a mińß ¶aan iŇč-kow i an-ta-man subar~…ĺ patiz…ôŇč tu pu-r~…ĺaj-ar~…ĺ a minatu, mar~…ĺa u kitizaan paz…ôŇč tu si ¶umiaj. mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i pu-r~…ĺaj-ar~…ĺ minatu ¶api nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a ta-an-ta-man a ńßajmaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu mitijuŇč tu iŇč-kow ¶…ônbu a makakadum mizak…ôp tu si ¶umiaj, imaańßini ujni a kitizaan tuŇčus nu in-tuaj r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an. iŇč-kow nu mabur~…ĺawaj ¶…ôbu sakaj pańßabaj atu an-ta-man a ka ¶a ¶ajat, patiz…ôŇč tu an-ta-man a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° "andaman ńßom…ôs". kaizaw k…ôza**** an-ta-man aŇčaŇčan u puu Ē~ ° nu d…ômiad masumasumad a miadup atu miar~…ĺa tu sakauzip. ¶ja-r~…ĺow-wa atu san-ti-n…ô-ar~…ĺ amin miida tu piadu atu miar~…ĺa a kawaw, u owŇč- ¶i i **** a mińß ¶a pa ¶umud tu sanasaj par~…ĺuma, nika ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßiza par~…ĺuma, pakaj piar~…ĺa tu sanasaj pasaj in-tu ¶…ôbu nu painiaj par~…ĺijun miar~…ĺa pab…ôr~…ĺi tu kakanan atu kusi a tuud, namańßiza owŇč- ¶i a kakanan u sar~…ĺuŇču ¶ ńßajmaw nu tawaj a tuud mir~…ĺutaj tu nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a ńß…ô ¶i. misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu tuud**** an-ta-man zuma miida tu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan atu bajuaj a kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ. suka atu nir~…ĺuŇč r~…ĺait papur~…ĺuŇč…ôn tu tuud nu an-ta-man kakanan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, an-ta-man u sapisup…ôd ku suka, nir~…ĺuŇč r~…ĺait miapi tu sar~…ĺir~…ĺ, ujni a tuud ńßina mabakańß nu naajawaj a bar~…ĺiŇča Ē~ ° matab…ôsi Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺaiŇč tatukus. in-tu ¶…ôbu mukinaj a siuj, daŇčańß atu sapisańß…ômaj par~…ĺa umijagi…ôn pab…ôr~…ĺi tu owŇč- ¶i, ¶a-wa atu san-ti-n…ô-ar~…ĺ, mikutaj tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺima nisaŇčaan pakaj pawar~…ĺian nińßutńßutan nu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu kapuwa siuj. pu…ôn…ôŇčan **** an-ta-man a pu…ôn…ôŇčan midudu ¶ tu puu Ē~ ° nu mińß ¶aan amasumad, puu Ē~ ° ka ¶akan "** a bur~…ĺad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad" u s…ôpataj a r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i dadipasan ¶api patiz…ôŇč tu nu …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °aj r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pasaaj t…ôban samur~…ĺu ńßan mir~…ĺaŇčat. zuma nijazu Ē~ °aj tatajtajaj a tatama atu bar~…ĺuńßaj mar~…ĺaa ¶awaaj par~…ĺa…ôd ńßan tu nijazu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw, mu…ôn…ôŇč i zumaaj nu …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ju masumad ku d…ômiad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad ńßawsa, an-ta-man amakaj dadipasan mabur~…ĺaw tajza n…ô-r~…ĺu r~…ĺabu nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mu…ôn…ôŇč, an-ta-man mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ ° a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° samur~…ĺu ńßan mir~…ĺaŇčat, nika s…ôpat anu ¶aaj r~…ĺima ku r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma tiza mu…ôn…ôŇč.
